mcp_scope_note: GitHub MCP in this session is scoped to mohammedabdelshafy/new-power only. To monitor other repos via MCP, expand repo access in session settings.
add_session_instructions: To register a new session, add an entry with: id, name, repo, branch, local_path, language, visibility, role (master|peer|slave), status (active|paused|archived), github_url, open_issues, open_prs, last_push, notes, mcp_accessible, action_required.
